criteria: As the employee, leave a voice message summarizing this complaint to your boss.
Include an appropriate solution which solves the complaint and makes the customer happy.
Your answer should be accurate, comprehensive, and polite.
cueCardContent:
Dear Inline Training,
I am writing to let you know how disappointed we were with the training event on Monday.  My team needs this software for their daily work, but they feel that the training did not include important information. Many important topics were not covered, and my employees still do not understand how to use the software correctly. We need to deal with this matter immediately. This training was very expensive, and we expect more. 
Please contact me with a solution to this problem

cueCardContent:
Dear Sir,
I am writing to complain aboout the recent order. We bought 500 of your alarm clocks. Unfortunately, we only received 400. Also, we stated we wanted only back alarm clocks, but you sent a mixture of black and red. 
We need to fix this issue before our hotel opens on the 1st of next month. If you cannot fix this, we expect a full refund.
Please contact me immediately. 
Regards,
Maritime Hotel

criteria: As the employee, leave a voice message summarizing this complaint to your boss.

cueCardContent:
Dear Sukitup Power Tools,
I am writing to complain about the industrial robotic vacuum cleaners we bought for our factory in Saratoga.
At first, we were excited, but since then we’ve had a large number of issues. The robotic vacuum cleaners frequently stop working, and don’t clean the floors as expected.
Our production area must be clean, so we need to fix these problems immediately.
Your immediate attention to this matter is highly appreciated, as it directly impacts our daily operations. Please contact us at once.

cueCardContent:
Dear MyBlanket Inc.,
I am writing about our recent order with your company. We requested 300 units of your cotton bed sheets, but unfortunately, we received only 250 units. Also, the color of the delivered items does not match our specific order; we requested only white sets, but there are blue sets included. As our hotel is opening on the first of the month, we need to fix this problem immediately. Please contact me as soon as possible.

Dear Level One Conference Centre,
 I am writing about our recent room booking at your conference centre. In your email, there is an error in the reservation details. We booked a larger conference room for 30 people, but unfortunately, we have been given a smaller room that can only hold half of our group.
 Our conference is taking place tomorrow, and we must deal with this issue now. Your help is essential for the success of our conference.  Please contact me immediately.
